chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.14 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on C.M.A No.3007/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on C.M.A No.3008/2025 22.12.2025. Appellant Abid Khan is present in person ************ 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, the appellant seeks execution of the appellate judgment dated 30.10.2025 and decree dated 10.12.2025, approved by this Court, in this 1st Appeal on 04.12.2025. At this stage, the suspension of the order dated 30.10.2025 signed on 04.12.2025 has also already concluded. Therefore, the listed application is not maintainable before this forum and is hereby dismissed in limine. The appellant is at liberty to move appropriate application for enforcement before the competent court. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
